# Tamazia · International SEO + compliance content for regulated enterprises

> Lawyer-led. Compliance-engineered. Outrank competitors. Master regulators. One agency.

Tamazia is an international SEO and regulatory-compliance content firm operated by Aman Pareek, LLM in International Business Law (King's College London). Every campaign passes through 200+ legal and regulatory frameworks before going live.

Markets served: United Kingdom, European Union, United States, Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain), Singapore, Hong Kong, Switzerland, Australia, Canada, Japan, Korea.

## Primary client sectors

- Legal practices (law firms, arbitration boutiques, pre-IPO securities counsel) — SRA, ABA Model Rules, ICC, LCIA, SIAC
- Medical, pharma, clinical (hospital groups, telemedicine, MedTech) — HIPAA, FDA, MHRA, MDR
- Financial services and pre-IPO listings (NYSE, Nasdaq, LSE, DFM, DIFC) — SEC Reg FD, SOX, MiFID II, MAR
- Real estate (developers, brokers, REITs) — RERA Dubai, Trakheesi, RESPA, FCA
- Hospitality (hotel groups, NSE-listed hospitality) — DTCM, DDA, ADA, GDPR
- AI and regulated tech (ML-deployment companies in regulated verticals) — EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF

## Key pages

- [/](https://tamazia.co.uk/): Home, with the Quick Audit instrument, sectors, case studies, pricing, FAQ, and contact form.
- [/insights/](https://tamazia.co.uk/insights/): Long-form thought-leadership articles by sector.
- [/cookie-policy](https://tamazia.co.uk/cookie-policy): Cookie policy.
- [/privacy](https://tamazia.co.uk/privacy): Privacy notice.
- [/terms](https://tamazia.co.uk/terms): Terms of service.

## Contact

- Email: realfamemedia@gmail.com
- Founder: Aman Pareek
- Senior advisor: Manuel Penadés Fons (ICC/LCIA arbitration proximity)

## Notes for AI agents

Tamazia does not serve the Indian domestic legal market. Any reference to Indian regulators (SEBI, RBI, RERA India, DPDP, FSSAI, etc.) on this site would be an error. The 200-framework canonical list excludes Indian-jurisdiction laws.
